 Tuolumne County Health Department WIC
Tuolumne County Health Department WIC - Sonora WIC Clinics
Name
Tuolumne County Health Department WIC
Address
20111 Cedar Road N.
Sonora, CA 95370
Phone Number
(209) 533-7431
Fax
(209) 533-7453
Operation hours
Mon - Tues: 8:00am - 5:00pm; Wed: 7:30am - 5:30pm; Thurs - Fri: 8:00am - 5:00pm
Type
Clinic/Application Site
Web Site
http://www.tuolumnecounty.ca.gov/
Services Offered
Vouchers to buy healthy supplemental foods; Nutrition Education; Online Education; Breastfeeding Services/Support; Referral to Health Care/Community Services
Description
WIC serves: All foster children under five years old who meet eligibility requirements; Breastfeeding women up to one year postpartum; All documented/undocumented persons in a family who meet eligibility requirements (their application or legal status will not be jeopardized in any way); Grandparents or guardians may receive vouchers for eligible infants and children under five; Infants and children under five years old; Non-breastfeeding women up to six months postpartum; Pregnant women; Single fathers may receive vouchers for eligible infants / children. WIC is an income based program. To qualify, you must meet the income guidelines or the person for whom you are applying must have active Medi-Cal, food stamps, or TANF.
Phone 2
Contact Person
E-Mail
WIC Foods
Milk; Cheese and Eggs; Soy and Tofu; Whole Grains; Breakfast Cereal; Peanut Butter, Dry Beans, Peas or Lentils, and Canned Mature Beans; Bottled Juice and Concentrate Juice; Fruits and Vegetables; Infant Cereal, Infant Formula, Fresh Bananas, and Infant Fruits and Vegetables; Infant Meats and Canned Fish
